action.reasoning: Observation: DINOv2 with frozen features achieved 0.4987 balanced accuracy. The model is still overfitting to the source domains (val acc 0.76 vs test acc 0.49). Analysis: To improve domain generalization, we need stronger regularization to prevent the linear classifier from memorizing source-specific features (like backgrounds). Decision: I will add Mixup (alpha=0.2), Label Smoothing (0.1), Dropout (0.3) before the classifier, and RandomResizedCrop to the training pipeline. I will also increase weight decay to 0.1. Since these augmentations make the task harder, I will increase training to 20 epochs. This should take ~55 minutes, well within the 100 minutes remaining.
